title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by 25bps at their June 2026 meeting?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 2%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: CPI's surge to 4.2% YoY plus a hawkish new Chair create a small hike tail the market (0.5%) underweights, but a first-meeting unprimed hike is near-unprecedented; modal is still no-hike, so no actionable lean.

history.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 3%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: A 25bp hike requires a tightening pivot with no telegraphing; April was an 8-4 hold with no member favoring a hike and FedWatch prices ~0.6%.
